title: Codex CLI tilde expansion resolves ~// to / enabling sandbox writable root escape
description: The maybe_expand_home_directory function only handles ~ and ~/ prefixes but passes ~// through unmodified. When Path::join receives a path starting with /, it discards the left-hand side entirely, so config values like ~//etc resolve to /etc as an absolute path. This broadens the sandbox writable root to arbitrary directories. Found via commit audit of openai/codex: 8179312f 'Fix tilde expansion to avoid absolute-path escape'.
